items.name: <Vendor plugin bundle>
items.apply: for f in <PluginA> <PluginB>; do cp -R "$HOME/migration/vst-payload/VST3/$f.vst3" "/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/"; done
items.notes: <Self-contained, copyable. Stage binaries into manifests/vst-payload/{VST,VST3,Components}/. NATIVE binaries — source.arch must match the target. Paid plugins may still need license entry on first launch (keep purchase email; do NOT store the key).>

items.name: <Vendor plugin (installer-based)>
items.notes: <Better installed via the vendor installer due to licensing. Some plugin sets install/license exclusively through a companion app — set dependencies: ["app-<companion>"] and keep selected in sync with that app.>
dependencies: <id of a required companion app/installer, or empty []>
items.requires_runtime: <e.g. companion app + vendor account/licenses, or null>
